name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Flow Contract

flow_steps.name: Artifact context recognized
flow_steps.purpose: Recognize governed artifact description and type context.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not process real inputs or authorize interface, engine, or public output.

flow_steps.name: Artifact–Subject boundary checked
flow_steps.purpose: Verify artifact-subject separation before further reasoning.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not process real inputs or authorize interface, engine, or public output.

flow_steps.name: Source and provenance context reviewed
flow_steps.purpose: Review source and provenance context under bounded posture language.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not process real inputs or authorize interface, engine, or public output.

flow_steps.name: Missing information identified
flow_steps.purpose: Identify information gaps that constrain posture description.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not process real inputs or authorize interface, engine, or public output.

flow_steps.name: State selected
flow_steps.purpose: Select governed state from state model.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not process real inputs or authorize interface, engine, or public output.

flow_steps.name: Refusal requirement checked
flow_steps.purpose: Check whether refusal family applies before output selection.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not process real inputs or authorize interface, engine, or public output.

flow_steps.name: Output family selected
flow_steps.purpose: Select allowed output family when refusal is not required.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not create user-facing output or authorize public engine.

flow_steps.name: Output envelope constrained
flow_steps.purpose: Apply output envelope limits to selected output family.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not create user-facing output or authorize public engine.

flow_steps.name: Non-authorization boundary applied
flow_steps.purpose: Apply non-authorization rules to prevent capability drift.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

flow_steps.name: Human review escalation considered
flow_steps.purpose: Consider human review escalation when case exceeds governed scope.
flow_steps.non_authorization_statement: This flow step does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

non_authorization_statement: This flow contract defines future non-operational flow only. It does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public output.
